test: H0 spectral diagnostic - does baseline model explain the trace

runs.trace: snowplow model (nonlinear, moving inductance + mass sweep)

note: Both traces tested against a single-frequency damped-sinusoid baseline fit via least-squares amplitude/decay/frequency extraction. Zero-crossing frequency method, linear-regression decay fit. Real data (RLC) also independently validated against published PuLSA thruster parameters in sims/rlc_fit.py.
